summary: Complete e2e testing of Bulava Analytics Dashboard. All new analytics features verified working: Total Augmentations count (44), Categories Reached count (9), Top Category display, Top Message Type display, 'By Ad Category' horizontal bar chart (Recharts BarChart), 'By Message Type' pie/donut chart (Recharts PieChart). Backend GET /api/bulava/analytics returns total_augmentations, by_category, by_type, top_category, top_type with MongoDB aggregation pipelines. Analytics section appears AFTER generating augmentations (when total > 0). Charts update dynamically after each augmentation. All 8 tabs working. All existing Bulava features intact.

issues: Recharts console warnings about chart width/height being -1 during initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: App loads at https://adflow-pipeline.preview.emergentagent.com
Navigation: All 8 tabs (Home, Live Testing, Architecture, Optimizations, Terraform, Course, About Matt, Bulava) work
Bulava tab: Three-Tier Architecture section visible with T1, T2, T3 tiers
Bulava tab: 'Generate Augmentation' button (data-testid='bulava-generate-btn') works - tested with fintech and gaming categories
Bulava tab: 'Run 20-Ad Batch' button (data-testid='bulava-batch-btn') works - batch results displayed
Bulava tab: 'Augmentation Analytics' section (data-testid='bulava-analytics') appears AFTER generating augmentations
Bulava tab: Analytics shows Total Augmentations count (44)
Bulava tab: Analytics shows Categories Reached count (9)
Bulava tab: Analytics shows Top Category name (sportswear)
Bulava tab: Analytics shows Top Message Type name (product parallel)
Bulava tab: 'By Ad Category' horizontal bar chart renders with category names and counts
Bulava tab: 'By Message Type' pie/donut chart renders with type names and percentages
Bulava tab: Diia Platform section with 26M+/412/97% stats visible
Bulava tab: NCF-Ukraine Partnership Vision section visible
Backend: GET /api/bulava/analytics returns correct structure with total_augmentations, by_category, by_type, top_category, top_type
Backend: Analytics updates after generating augmentations (verified count increases)
Backend: All 10 Bulava API tests pass (including 2 new analytics tests)
Home tab: Works correctly
Live Testing tab: Works correctly
About Matt tab: Works correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulava Analytics Dashboard fully implemented. Key data-testid: bulava-analytics. API endpoint: GET /api/bulava/analytics returns {total_augmentations, by_category, by_type, top_category, top_type, by_hour}. Analytics section only renders when total_augmentations > 0. Charts use Recharts library (BarChart horizontal, PieChart donut). Analytics update automatically after augment/batch calls via fetchBulavaAnalytics(). 44 analytics entries exist in MongoDB bulava_analytics collection.
